title: Flaxen Flair Pancakes
description: A delicious and fluffy pancake recipe made with flaxen and flair. Perfect for a weekend brunch.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flaxen, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, sugar, and flair.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
